name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
description: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi is a central sector scheme that provides a minimum income support of ₹6,000 per year to all landholding farmer families across the country.
whyRecommended: Guaranteed income support for all farm sizes to help cover agricultural and household expenses.
eligibility: Must hold cultivable land in India.
Must have a valid Aadhaar mapped to a bank account.
Institutional landholders and high-income professionals are excluded.
communityInsight: Over 2,140 farmers in your district claimed this benefit this year.

name: PM Krishi Sinchayee Yojana
description: Focuses on 'More crop per drop' by providing substantial subsidies for the installation of micro-irrigation systems like drip and sprinkler lines.
whyRecommended: Essential for improving yield grading while significantly reducing water usage costs.
eligibility: Farmers with up to 5 acres of land receive maximum prioritization (small/marginal).
Available for all commercial and horticulture crops.
Must have a validated water source (borewell/canal/pond).
communityInsight: Farmers using this subsidy increased their Grade A yield by an average of 34%.

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Provides comprehensive insurance coverage against crop failure due to non-preventable natural risks like droughts, floods, and unseasonal rainfall.
whyRecommended: Your designated location has recorded high weather variability in the last 12 months.
eligibility: Notifying crops in the defined area.
Sharecroppers and tenant farmers are also eligible.
Must apply before the notified final cutoff date for the respective cropping season.
documentsRequired: Land Ownership Proof or Tenancy Agreement
communityInsight: Last season, 142 claims were successfully processed in your Taluk.

name: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture
description: A centrally sponsored scheme designed specifically to promote the holistic growth of the horticulture sector encompassing fruits, vegetables, root & tuber crops, mushrooms, spices, flowers, aromatic plants, coconut, cashew, cocoa and bamboo.
whyRecommended: Highly beneficial since you are cultivating high-value horticulture crops.
eligibility: Must intend to grow approved horticulture crops.
Project proposals required for subsidies exceeding standard plantation costs.
Applicable for setting up pack-houses and cold chains.
documentsRequired: Detailed Project Report (DPR) for large setups
communityInsight: 7 neighboring farmers got subsidies for building on-farm packhouses last month.
